frames.narrationSummary: Seed the frontier with 1 rotten sources.
Check whether the frontier still has work before dequeuing the next wave head.
Dequeue current at (0, 0).
current ignores (-1, 0) because it lies outside the grid.
current inspects neighbor at (1, 0).
current infects neighbor at (1, 0), so it joins the next frontier wave.
current ignores (0, -1) because it lies outside the grid.
current inspects neighbor at (0, 1).
current infects neighbor at (0, 1), so it joins the next frontier wave.
Check whether the frontier still has work before dequeuing the next wave head.
Dequeue current at (1, 0).
current rejects neighbor at (0, 0) because it is already rotten.
current rejects neighbor at (2, 0) because it is empty.
current ignores (1, -1) because it lies outside the grid.
current inspects neighbor at (1, 1).
current infects neighbor at (1, 1), so it joins the next frontier wave.
Check whether the frontier still has work before dequeuing the next wave head.
Dequeue current at (0, 1).
current ignores (-1, 1) because it lies outside the grid.
current rejects neighbor at (1, 1) because it is already rotten.
current rejects neighbor at (0, 0) because it is already rotten.
current inspects neighbor at (0, 2).
current infects neighbor at (0, 2), so it joins the next frontier wave.
Check whether the frontier still has work before dequeuing the next wave head.
Dequeue current at (1, 1).
current rejects neighbor at (0, 1) because it is already rotten.
current inspects neighbor at (2, 1).
current infects neighbor at (2, 1), so it joins the next frontier wave.
current rejects neighbor at (1, 0) because it is already rotten.
current rejects neighbor at (1, 2) because it is empty.
Check whether the frontier still has work before dequeuing the next wave head.
Dequeue current at (0, 2).
current ignores (-1, 2) because it lies outside the grid.
current rejects neighbor at (1, 2) because it is empty.
current rejects neighbor at (0, 1) because it is already rotten.
current ignores (0, 3) because it lies outside the grid.
Check whether the frontier still has work before dequeuing the next wave head.
Dequeue current at (2, 1).
current rejects neighbor at (1, 1) because it is already rotten.
current ignores (3, 1) because it lies outside the grid.
current rejects neighbor at (2, 0) because it is empty.
current inspects neighbor at (2, 2).
current infects neighbor at (2, 2), so it joins the next frontier wave.
Check whether the frontier still has work before dequeuing the next wave head.
Dequeue current at (2, 2).
current rejects neighbor at (1, 2) because it is empty.
current ignores (3, 2) because it lies outside the grid.
current rejects neighbor at (2, 1) because it is already rotten.
current ignores (2, 3) because it lies outside the grid.
Return 4 once every fresh orange has rotted.
